targets.name: bbb
targets.notes: amd64 Linux docker host (the proven O6/eval venue). Authoritative for gate:compose + stress/chaos + the real bot (Lane B).

targets.name: ci
targets.notes: GitHub Actions; runs the green-or-skip gate suite (docker-compose gates self-skip without a docker runner).

resources.name: prod-cloud
resources.notes: production Vexa stack that launches + drives the speaking bots (Lane B / L4 meeting eval).

resources.name: speaker-tokens
resources.notes: one test-account token per synthetic speaker; N tokens ⇒ an N-speaker meeting. Decrypt at run-time from the secret store; NEVER paste values here.

resources.name: stt
resources.validate: GET https://transcription.vexa.ai/balance with the token → require HTTP 200 AND balance_minutes > 0. STT tokens are PER-USER (the response carries the account email + balance). Preflight EVERY live run; it caught the 0-balance + the 403 wrong-key-type before any audio.
resources.notes: the bot's STT at transcription.vexa.ai (OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions; /balance·/purchase·/admin/user-tokens). prod/transcription.enc.env#TRANSCRIPTION_SERVICE_TOKEN = internal@vexa.ai's reusable token. CURRENT BALANCE = 0 min → /purchase (or auto-topup) before a live transcript (Learning #28).

resources.name: minio
resources.notes: recording master object store (in-stack on compose for Lane A).

resources.name: meeting
resources.notes: a live Google Meet (per-run NATIVE_ID) the bot + speakers join (Lane B).

resources.name: admit
resources.notes: the one human step for Lane B: admit the bot in the Meet UI.
